chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1172 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A 2. For hearing of main case. 12.08.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that since the amendments have been made by the Provincial Assembly of Sindh in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 (Sindh Act No.VIII of 2024) through the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, however, the same is yet to receive the assent of the Governor and to be published in the official Gazette, he does not press this petition and submits that the petitioner will exhaust the remedy available to him under the law. The guidelines in this regard have been provided by this Court in C. P. No. D-625 of 2025 (Re: Hafeezullah Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others) at Circuit Court Larkana and C. P. No. D-725 of 2025 (Re: Peer Bux v. The State and others) at Circuit Court Hyderabad. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
